items.title: Tracing the Evolution of Civilizational Wisdom: Spirituality from Ancient Traditions to Modern Reflections
items.summary: This piece examines the enduring legacy of spiritual wisdom from ancient civilizations, highlighting key historical milestones and their present-day relevance. It invites readers to reflect on spirituality as a living tradition that informs ethical frameworks and cultural identity in a rapidly changing world.

items.title: Legacy and Transformation: The Historical Arc of Global Sports and Its Future Trajectories
items.summary: By tracing the origins and evolution of global sports, this article reveals how sports have mirrored societal shifts and fostered community identity. It also considers future challenges and opportunities in maintaining sports’ cultural and social relevance.

items.title: From Multipolarity to New World Orders: Historical Comparisons and Strategic Implications for 21st Century Geopolitics
items.summary: This editorial situates current geopolitical dynamics within a historical continuum of world order changes, offering insights into the strategic implications for nations and global stability. It closes by inviting readers to consider the future shape of global governance.

items.title: The Media’s Role in Shaping Democracy: Historical Frames and Institutional Consequences in the Digital Age
items.summary: This article traces the historical development of media as a pillar of democracy, analyzing institutional shifts from print to digital and their consequences for public discourse and democratic resilience. It encourages reflection on media’s future role in society.

items.title: Welfare State Evolution: Historical Lessons and Institutional Comparisons in Shaping Public Programmes
items.summary: By examining historical trajectories of welfare policies across different societies, this piece sheds light on the successes and limitations of public programmes. It invites readers to reflect on how these lessons can inform future welfare reforms.
